postCreateCommand.mongo: podman pull docker.io/library/mongo:8.2-noble;  podman run -p 27017:27017 -d --name storing-mongo docker.io/library/mongo:8.2-noble;
postCreateCommand.redis: podman pull docker.io/library/redis:8.6.4; podman run -d --name storing-redis docker.io/library/redis:8.6.4;

postStartCommand: rm -rf /run/libpod/alive; podman restart storing-sql storing-mongo storing-redis; podman restart storing-sql storing-mongo storing-redis
